content.en:
Of course, it was Ye Tian's guess that the Gujing Vision could resist the attack of Tianzun, and he couldn't test it in front of him, unless he found a Source Emperor-level Source Beast.

But he didn't want to die, in the Origin Realm, his strength was weakened a lot, and in his heyday, he could only barely survive under a weaker Tianzun-level powerhouse, if he really met a Source Emperor, he would be in trouble.

At the beginning, the reason why the Four Great Source Emperors didn't pursue him was entirely because of the Heavenly Pole Fruit and the Heavenly Pole Tree, otherwise, he might not be able to escape.

Seeing the attack of the Source Emperor level, he didn't want to make trouble for himself.

"It's time to go!"

Ye Tian's figure flashed and left the underground space.

This canyon, which has lost the Well of Origin, can be said to have completely lost its value.

......

Somewhere in the Origin Realm.

Aurora looked embarrassed, and there was a big hole in her body, although the blood was no longer flowing, it looked a little oozing.

At this time, his face was as white as paper, and his breath became extremely weak.

"Damn, the Source Beast of the Origin Realm is inevitably too powerful!"

Aurora said with a tremor in her heart.

At the beginning, he encountered some weak source beasts in the origin realm, and they could only attack physically, without any special means, and he also looked down on the source beasts of the origin realm.

After all, in his opinion, the source beast that can only be reckless has no deterrent power at all, after all, even if it is Tianzun, if there is no endless divine power, no various secret techniques and true skills, no various magical powers, no Great Dao realm, he is just a weak chicken, and he is not as strong as him.

But he never expected that the Source Beast of the Origin Realm would have a terrifying existence that could rival the Domination and even the Heavenly Venerable just by relying on his physical body and strength talent.

And he encountered a top-notch Source Emperor not long ago, although he was not as good as the Source Emperor, but he still hit him hard with one move.

If he hadn't escaped with the help of the Secret Treasure, he might have fallen there.

But the source beast didn't seem to be ready to give up on it at all, and chased it all the way.

"The Origin Realm has suppressed me too much, if I can exert all my strength, I won't be unable to compete with this Source Emperor, and the power of those secret treasures in the Origin Realm has also dropped greatly, there is no way to let me escape too far, otherwise I will definitely be able to escape!"

Aurora thought to herself.

He wanted to ask for help, but when he thought that everyone was scattered far away, even if he asked for help, the other party would not be able to rush over.

Besides, what's the use of rushing over?

Losing the Heavenly Venerable-level puppets, the combat power of all of them united was not strong, and coupled with the suppression of the Origin Realm, the combined efforts of the Sons of the Era could not defeat a top-notch Origin Emperor.

"I wonder if the Ten Thousand Law Divine Lord can compete with this top Source Emperor?"

Aurora Dark Passage.

In his opinion, the Ten Thousand Law Divine Lord was suppressed in the Origin Realm, even if he couldn't defeat this Source Emperor, he would be able to remain immortal, after all, the original Ten Thousand Law Divine Lord was hard to shake the Heavenly Venerable and attack without dying!

The only pity is that he doesn't have the contact information of Ye Tian, the Ten Thousand Law Divine Lord, after all, they were enemies before, so how can they have any contact.

Rumble!!!

A terrifying aura came from afar.

Aurora sensed this breath and suddenly changed her expression.

Without guessing, he knew that it was the terrible Source Emperor who was chasing after him.

Infinite killing intent followed, and then a colorful divine cow chased after it, and the void seemed to be nothing in its eyes, and the speed was too fast, much faster than the cosmic god teleportation.

This is a means to break the shackles of time and space with only the physical body, otherwise the Colorful Divine Cow will not be able to catch up with the aurora without great magical powers such as speed.

After all, Aurora will have a great magical power of light, and the speed is so fast.

But now, he is not as good as the colorful sacred cow.

Because of this, Aurora couldn't get rid of this colorful sacred cow, and could only use desperate means to escape again and again.

But now, he is seriously injured, and he has no time to heal, and his speed is getting slower and slower.

If he went on like this, he wouldn't be able to escape.

"Do you want to give up that ......?"

Aurora thought so.

But he quickly showed a firm gaze: "The value of that thing is even comparable to a supreme treasure, and it must not be given up!"

Aurora felt that he didn't have no chance to escape, as long as the Colorful Divine Cow was negligent, he would have the hope of escaping, and then hide, and then the Colorful Divine Cow would have no special means, and he would definitely not be able to find him.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

The earth shattered everywhere, and the colorful sacred cow used its powerful power to shatter countless spaces and the earth, vowing to kill the aurora.

After a while, Aurora suddenly sensed a breath.

"Ten Thousand Dharma Divine Lord, save me, I am willing to pay for a top-notch treasure!"

Aurora Voice.

Distance.

Ye Tianzheng rushed over because he sensed the breath of a Source Emperor, and was about to test the defense power of his ancient well vision, but he heard Aurora's call for help.

"Could it be that the Source Emperor is chasing and killing Aurora, what a coincidence!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

He has nothing to do with Aurora, and the reason why he and the other sons of the era were saved was because everyone was a united front and was to deal with the creatures of destruction, so they came to the rescue.

But now, everyone is in the origin realm, which is not a united front, and it can be saved, and naturally it can not be saved.

But Aurora is willing to give a top-level treasure as a reward, such a good thing, he doesn't dislike it.

Besides, he's missing a top-level Arcana!

"Let's take a look!"

Ye Tian teleported a few times and rushed over.

"Well, the top-level Source Emperor!"

Ye Tian saw the colorful sacred cow, and then looked at the tragic situation of Aurora, and couldn't help but feel some sympathy for Aurora.

He knows the background of Aurora, there are a lot of life-saving things, and the Colorful Sacred Cow doesn't have many means to pursue, but he has been chasing Aurora and not giving up, which shows how unlucky Aurora is.

"Lord of Ten Thousand Laws, save me!"

Aurora saw Ye Tian, and while breathing a sigh of relief, he also hurriedly flew over.

"Yes, but the top treasure you promised must be promised to me!"

Ye Tian said.

"For you!" Aurora hurriedly promised.

Ye Tian also knew that Aurora was such a son of the era, and there were a bunch of terrifying supremes behind him as backers, so he would definitely not be repaid, so he took action to intercept some colorful sacred cows.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian fought against the Colorful Divine Cow, and the result was naturally that Ye Tian was blown away, but there was no injury.

Seeing that Ye Tian had really blocked the Colorful Divine Cow and had not suffered any injuries, Aurora was overjoyed.

"Such a strong force, worthy of being the top Source Emperor!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He wanted to wait for the Colorful Divine Cow to continue attacking, but he didn't expect the Colorful Divine Cow to ignore him, but rushed towards the Aurora, his eyes full of anger and killing intent.

Immediately, Ye Tian stopped the Colorful Divine Cow again.

But the Colorful Divine Cow seemed to only stare at the aurora, not at all at all, allowing Ye Tian to attack it like this, it only hit Ye Tian away, but did not continue to attack Ye Tian.

"Aurora, you go first!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Thank you!"

The aurora flew away with a thud, without stopping at all.

Seeing that the aurora was leaving, Ye Tiancai opened his own vision of the ancient well, and the rich chaotic rules rippled out.

Swish!

Ye Tian used the ancient well vision to resist the bombardment of the Colorful Divine Cow, this time Ye Tian was not knocked away, but the Colorful Divine Cow was shocked away, and the ancient well vision was not broken at all.

"It's such a strong defense, and it also has a shock-back effect, hahaha, the fragments of the Origin Well are integrated into the ancient well vision, and it really makes the ancient well vision completely transformed. It should be a different name, what is it called?"

Ye Tian pondered.

Soon, a resounding name was thought of -

Chaos Origin Divine Well!
